additional_notes: The USC 2026 Pro Day is confirmed for March 12, 2026 (today), but as of this search, no testing results have been published yet. The pro day is either currently underway or just concluded, and results have not yet been reported by any outlet. Based on pre-pro-day reporting, the following USC players declared for the 2026 NFL Draft and are expected participants: WR Makai Lemon, WR Ja'Kobi Lane, TE Lake McRee, C J'Onre Reed, DT Keeshawn Silver, DE Anthony Lucas, LB Eric Gentry, CB D.J. Harvey, CB DeCarlos Nicholson, S Kamari Ramsey, and S Bishop Fitzgerald. Of these, seven attended the 2026 NFL Combine (Lemon, Lane, Gentry, Ramsey, Fitzgerald, McRee, Lucas). Notable: Makai Lemon did not run the 40-yard dash or participate in testing drills at the Combine (only did on-field/positional drills and route-running), so his pro day 40 time was highly anticipated. Ja'Kobi Lane ran a 4.47 40 at the Combine with a 40-inch vertical and 10-foot-9 broad jump, and was expected to focus on the shuttle and 3-cone at pro day. Pro Football Network's schedule listed USC with 7 tracked prospects for its pro day. Results should be available within hours from sources like On3/WeAreSC, NFL.com, ESPN, and the USC Athletics site. This record should be updated once results are published.
